---
title: "Final Project - PDAC Demographic Data Analysis"
authors: "Madison Blake, Kristyn Gumpper-Fedus, Sean Kirkpatrick"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    echo = FALSE,
    message = FALSE,
    warning = FALSE,
    dev = "png",
    fig.path = "Figures/",
    fig.retina = 1
)

dir.create("Tables", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create("Figures", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tableone)
library(mice)

source("R/plotHelpers.R")
source("R/reportHelpers.R")

```

```{r report_table_styles, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}

render_basic_table_styles()

```

```{r demographic_summary, results='asis'}

# Import data
metadata <- read_xlsx("Data/GSE314577/GSE314577_VUMC_Metadata_ch_revised.xlsx")

metadata_columns <- data.frame(
    column_name = names(metadata),
    row.names = NULL,
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Table One
demo <- metadata %>%
    transmute(
        CC = factor(CC),
        Sex = factor(Sex),
        Race = factor(Race),
        Age = as.numeric(age_sam)
    )

sex_counts_by_cc <- demo %>%
    count(CC, Sex, .drop = FALSE) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = CC, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

race_counts_by_cc <- demo %>%
    count(CC, Race, .drop = FALSE) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = CC, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

age_summary <- demo %>%
    group_by(CC) %>%
    summarise(
        Min = min(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        Max = max(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        Median = median(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        Mean = mean(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        SD = sd(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
    )

# Histogram of Age
png("Figures/age_histogram.png", width = 6 * 72, height = 5 * 72)
hist(
    demo$Age,
    main = "Histogram of Age Distribution",
    xlab = "Age",
    breaks = 10
)
invisible(dev.off())

age_summary_total <- demo %>%
    summarise(
        CC = "Total",
        Min = min(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        Max = max(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        Median = median(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        Mean = mean(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        SD = sd(Age, na.rm = TRUE)
    )

tableone_vars <- c("Sex", "Race", "Age")
tableone_factor_vars <- c("Sex", "Race")
tableone_obj <- CreateTableOne(
    vars = tableone_vars,
    strata = "CC",
    data = demo,
    factorVars = tableone_factor_vars,
    addOverall = TRUE
)

tableone_mat <- print(
    tableone_obj,
    showAllLevels = TRUE,
    quote = FALSE,
    noSpaces = TRUE,
    test = TRUE,
    smd = TRUE,
    printToggle = FALSE
)

tableone_df <- data.frame(
    Characteristic = rownames(tableone_mat),
    tableone_mat,
    row.names = NULL,
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

render_html_table(metadata_columns, caption = "Metadata columns")
render_html_table(utils::head(metadata, 3), caption = "Metadata preview")
render_html_table(sex_counts_by_cc, caption = "Sex counts by case/control status")
render_html_table(race_counts_by_cc, caption = "Race counts by case/control status")
render_html_table(age_summary, caption = "Age summary by case/control status", digits = 2)
render_html_table(age_summary_total, caption = "Overall age summary", digits = 2)
render_html_table(tableone_df, caption = "Table 1 demographic summary")

write.csv(tableone_df, "Tables/tableone_pdac.csv", row.names = FALSE)

tableone_html <- paste(
    c(
        capture.output(render_basic_table_styles()),
        knitr::kable(
            tableone_df,
            format = "html",
            row.names = FALSE,
            caption = "Table 1 demographic summary"
        )
    ),
    collapse = "\n"
)
writeLines(tableone_html, "tableone_pdac.html")

```

```{r missing_data_summary, results='asis'}
# Assess missing data patterns in demographic variables

# for each variable, get the count of missing values
missing_counts <- sapply(demo, function(x) sum(is.na(x)))
missing_proportions <- round(colMeans(is.na(demo)), 4)

missing_counts_df <- data.frame(
    variable = names(missing_counts),
    missing_count = as.integer(missing_counts),
    row.names = NULL,
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

missing_proportions_df <- data.frame(
    variable = names(missing_proportions),
    missing_proportion = as.numeric(missing_proportions),
    row.names = NULL,
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

render_html_table(missing_counts_df, caption = "Missing demographic values by variable")
render_html_table(missing_proportions_df, caption = "Missing demographic proportions by variable", digits = 4)

if (any(missing_counts > 0)) {
    missing_pattern <- mice::md.pattern(demo, plot = TRUE)

    missing_pattern_df <- data.frame(
        Pattern = rownames(missing_pattern),
        missing_pattern,
        row.names = NULL,
        check.names = FALSE,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    render_html_table(missing_pattern_df, caption = "Missing data pattern matrix")

    missing_indicator_data <- demo %>%
        mutate(
            missing_Sex = as.integer(is.na(Sex)),
            missing_Race = as.integer(is.na(Race)),
            missing_Age = as.integer(is.na(Age))
        )

    missing_by_cc <- missing_indicator_data %>%
        group_by(CC) %>%
        summarise(
            n = n(),
            missing_Sex = sum(missing_Sex),
            missing_Race = sum(missing_Race),
            missing_Age = sum(missing_Age),
            .groups = "drop"
        )
    render_html_table(missing_by_cc, caption = "Missing demographic values by case/control status")

    pairwise_missing <- t(is.na(demo)) %*% is.na(demo)

    pairwise_missing_df <- data.frame(
        Variable = rownames(pairwise_missing),
        pairwise_missing,
        row.names = NULL,
        check.names = FALSE,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    render_html_table(pairwise_missing_df, caption = "Pairwise missingness counts")

    png("Figures/demographic_missing_pattern.png", width = 7 * 72, height = 5 * 72)
    mice::md.pattern(demo)
    dev.off()
} else {
    cat("No missing demographic data detected in CC, Sex, Race, or Age.\n")
}

```
